President India approved conferment Padma Awards including case (counted one) list below.
list comprises Padma Vibhushan, Padma Bhushan Padma Shri Awardees.
Awardees women list also includes persons from category foreigners, NRIs, PIOs Posthumous Awardees.
Padma Awards, country's highest civilian awards, conferred three categories, namely, Padma Vibhushan, Padma Bhushan Padma Shri.
Awards given various disciplines/ fields activities, viz- art, social work, public affairs, science engineering, trade industry, medicine, literature education, sports, civil service, etc.
'Padma Vibhushan' awarded exceptional distinguished service; 'Padma Bhushan' distinguished service high order 'Padma Shri' distinguished service field.
awards announced occasion Republic every year.
awards conferred President India function held Rashtrapati Bhawan sometime around March/ April.
